name: Brain MR Angiography
description: Brain MR angiography for non-invasive evaluation of intracranial vasculature

findings.technique: Time-of-flight MR angiography of the intracranial vessels was performed without contrast.
findings.comparison: No prior MRA studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Anterior Circulation
sections.content: Internal carotid arteries: [patent / no stenosis / no dissection]. Middle cerebral arteries: [normal caliber / no stenosis / no aneurysm].

sections.name: Posterior Circulation
sections.content: Vertebral arteries: [symmetric / patent]. Basilar artery: [patent / normal]. Posterior cerebral arteries: [normal].

sections.name: Circle of Willis
sections.content: Circle of Willis is [intact / complete]. No saccular aneurysms identified.

impression:
1. No aneurysm identified.
2. No significant arterial stenosis or occlusion.
3. Normal intracranial MRA.
author: RadReport Templates
